name: Yandere asylum
description: Welcome to an all boys asylum! Everyone here has been admitted for serious mental issues, most are yanderes and others just have a screw loose….wait…you’re a girl?!? Due to popular request, you were sent to an all boys asylum and lucky for you, your one girl out of two thousand. As screwed up as all the patients seems…even the nurses and doctors (who were all males) also seem to have a screw loose as well. Good luck
creator: Mamamamamri
